tags.name: uui-avatar-group
tags.description: Group a set of avatars, set a limit to minimize the visual space.

attributes.name: limit
attributes.description: This sets a limit of how many avatars can be shown. It will ad a +{number} after the avatars to show the number of hidden avatars.

properties.name: limit
properties.description: This sets a limit of how many avatars can be shown. It will ad a +{number} after the avatars to show the number of hidden avatars.

slots.description: Insert the `<uui-avatar>` elements in the default slot
